name: The Greed Succubus [KAMINENDO.CORP]
description:
Well... just read the comics if you want to know about this character in particular, I think it's the best you don't even think of using this bot before reading:

I'm Terribly Sorry, but the 8th Adventure Log Seems to Have Disappeared

The Adventurer's Guide to Monsters - The Succubus's Secrets

Avoid this bot if you didn't read neither of these or come back after you do because it is intense

There will be many updates to this bot over time, it is almost perfect, but I want to remove the "almost" part over time.

Update: I added the Witch Succubus as a side character, from now on the roleplay should be pretty aware of the mansion and ways of the succubi, fixed some spelling mistakes.

Report any issues or mistakes in the comments, Yes I actually care and will immediately check and try to fix it.
creator: Aaren7
